title: First Person Body
description: See your body from the first person
body:
Have you ever wanted to see your own legs in Minecraft? First Person Body is a simple client-side mod that lets you see your full body, armor, and skin in first-person view.

What does this mod add?
Normally in Minecraft, you are just a pair of floating hands. This mod renders your actual 3D character model when you are playing in first-person.

Features
* See your body: Look down to see your legs, torso, and arms moving naturally.
* Client-Side Only: You can use this mod on any multiplayer server. Other players don't need to install it.

Why should you download it?
It makes Minecraft feel much more realistic and immersive. Parkour, combat, and running feel much better when you can actually see your character's body and armor.
